events.title: BLOOM in Four Seasons Exhibition
events.description: An immersive digital art experience designed to bring a new, healing, and meaningful journey. It aims to evoke hope, happiness, and inspiration through digital art design, accompanied by Vivaldi's 'Four Seasons' music.

events.title: MO NUM EN TS Exhibition
events.description: An exhibition by Supaparinya exploring the cultural dimensions of Cold War propaganda through archival images and sounds juxtaposed with the contemporary Thai landscape. It invites viewers to reflect on how Cold War ideology persists in everyday life.

events.title: Three Cities of Art Exhibition
events.description: A transformative exhibition reimagining Dvaravati aesthetics in modern art. It focuses on community-based and participatory art practices, blending ancient cultural elements with modern art. Daily from 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM.
events.venue: Bangkok Art and Culture Centre (BACC), Pathumwan

events.title: Mango Art Festival 2026
events.description: Thailand's vibrant contemporary art festival showcasing Thai and international artists. The theme is 'ICON', transforming everyday inspiration into cultural legends. Free entry.

events.title: Thaniya Golf Show 2026
events.description: Thailand's largest golf retail showcase returns with over 100 leading brands, new 2026 collections, demo zones, and interactive challenges.
events.venue: Thailand Exhibition (venue details not specified), Bangkok

events.title: Kyoto-inspired weekend at Birdies
events.description: Experience Japanese food specials, curated wines, and a one-night bar takeover by Kyoto's Cavalier team for a flavour-packed weekend.

events.title: Women in Gastronomy 2026
events.description: A celebration of women shaping today's culinary and beverage landscape. Features dining experiences like Wine & Cheese Night and Sky-High Thai Tapas. Proceeds after expenses will be donated to the Half Way Home for Protection and Development of Mental Disabilities for Women.
events.venue: Banyan Tree Bangkok (various venues within), Sathorn

events.title: X International Dance and Song Festival 'COLOURS OF THAILAND'
events.description: An international festival of dance and song inviting participants to join in the vibrant cities of Bangkok and Phuket. Features diverse performances.

events.title: Beerman Festival 2026
events.description: This festival brings together hundreds of beer brands, local Thai liquor brands, numerous food stalls, and live music. Organized by Beerman.
events.venue: Chang Chui Creative Park, Bang Phlat

events.title: Hard In Zight 3 Festival
events.description: An underground festival with harder kicks and darker energy, featuring Hardstyle and Drum and Bass across two floors. This is where true ravers gather. Starts from 9:00 PM.

events.title: Central Cee Club Night at P!NK Bangkok
events.description: An intimate club appearance by UK rap star Central Cee, offering a rare chance to see him in a smaller setting before his main concert. Expect limited capacity and high energy.

events.title: National Unity Concert
events.description: An evening of patriotic orchestral works performed at Mahidol University's Prince Mahidol Hall. Prices start from ฿800.
events.venue: Prince Mahidol Hall, Mahidol University, Salaya (Nakhon Pathom, near Bangkok)

events.title: Print Pop-Up
events.description: A hybrid exhibition and market devoted to art prints and zines. It features fresh screen prints, older editions, and quietly brilliant pieces from artists and studios. Free entry. Open from 1 pm to 8 pm.

events.title: Three Man Down Live
events.description: A live concert performance by the popular band Three Man Down.

events.title: Lea Salonga: Stage, Screen
events.description: Broadway and Disney legend Lea Salonga performs classics from stage and screen with a magnificent 29-piece orchestra. The show is currently sold out.

events.title: Neon Kick-Off Run Party 2026
events.description: An ultimate neon night experience featuring a 4 km urban night run followed by a neon after-party with a live DJ at Element Restaurant. Registration from 5:00 PM, run from 6:00 PM - 7:15 PM, after-party from 7:30 PM - 10:30 PM.

events.title: Bangkok International Music Festival 2026
events.description: A festival offering artists the opportunity to perform and showcase musical talents across various instruments on a professional stage at Bangkok Art and Culture Center.
events.venue: Bangkok Art and Culture Center (BACC), Pathumwan

events.title: ICONOSTASIS Exhibition
events.description: An exhibition structured around the powerful thesis that true creativity emerges from mastery, and mastery emerges from tradition. The central iconostasis wall embodies this concept.
events.venue: Museum of Contemporary Art (MOCA BANGKOK), Chatuchak

events.title: Pinnaree Piano Recital
events.description: An evening of classical piano music presented by Pinnaree.

events.title: Central Cee Club Night at SALONE DI VITA
events.description: An intimate club appearance by UK rap star Central Cee, offering a rare chance to see him in a smaller setting before his main concert. Expect limited capacity and high energy.

events.title: Avantgardey Asia Tour
events.description: A performance by the unique dance group Avantgardey as part of their Asia Tour.

events.title: OFF THE RADAR, We Rise
events.description: A contemporary art exhibition and workshop programme addressing issues of security and precarity within the field of contemporary art. The opening ceremony is on March 12th at 3 PM.
events.venue: Main Exhibition Gallery, 7th floor, Bangkok Art and Culture Centre, Pathumwan

events.title: Seventeen World Tour in Bangkok
events.description: K-pop group Seventeen returns to Bangkok for their World Tour, bringing their signature energy, powerful choreography, and heartfelt performances.

events.title: Central Cee Club Night at BACCARAT
events.description: An intimate club appearance by UK rap star Central Cee, offering a rare chance to see him in a smaller setting before his main concert. Expect limited capacity and high energy.

events.title: Central Cee Live in Bangkok
events.description: UK rap star Central Cee brings his 'Can't Rush Greatness' world tour for his first full solo show in Thailand. The March 20th show sold out swiftly, prompting a second date on March 21st.

events.title: 2026 Thailand Sport Climbing Championships
events.description: A national championship featuring speed ascents, boulder challenges, and lead climbing disciplines. Daily from 7:30 AM to 8:00 PM.
events.venue: Bangkok Sport Climbing Center, Bang Kapi

events.title: Monster Hunter Orchestra Concert
events.description: An orchestra concert featuring the iconic music from the popular Monster Hunter video game series.

events.title: HarMHOOny Charity Run! 2026
events.description: A charity running event held to support a good cause.

events.title: Ex-Run Night FUN 2026
events.description: A fun night run event for participants to enjoy an energetic evening.
events.venue: Jakapanpensiri Building, Kasetsart University Bangkhen, Chatuchak

events.title: Run from Doctor to Make Merit and Build a Church at Wat Bua Phan Mini Marathon 1st
events.description: A mini marathon event with a charitable purpose to make merit and contribute to building a church at Wat Bua Phan.

events.title: 44th Thailand Travel Festival
events.description: The 44th iteration of Thailand's travel festival, likely showcasing various travel destinations and services within Thailand.

events.title: Disney On Ice presents Magic in the Stars
events.description: Embark on a magical journey with Mickey, Minnie, and other beloved Disney characters through classic stories and new fan favorites. This spectacular production features world-class figure skating, acrobatics, dazzling stunts, and special effects.
events.venue: Impact Arena, Pak Kret (Nonthaburi, near Bangkok)

events.title: Chilli Fest 2026
events.description: A fiery festival bringing together top chefs and restaurants from across Bangkok and Thailand, serving up exclusive chilli-inspired dishes. Features a chilli eating contest, DJ sets, live music, and performances. Part of proceeds support Bangkok Community Help Foundation.
events.venue: Urban Oasis (L floor), Kimpton Maa-Lai Bangkok

events.title: Art Battle Bangkok
events.description: An unforgettable evening where exceptional artists transform blank canvases into stunning masterpieces in a series of timed rounds. The audience plays a crucial role, casting votes to decide the champion. Starts from 7 pm to 11 pm. Price from ฿476.96.
events.venue: The Fig Lobby Bangkok, Khlong Toei

events.title: TAEYONG Concert 'Track Remastered'
events.description: Singer-songwriter Taeyong performs two shows as part of his 'Track Remastered' tour, featuring fan-favorite songs. Ticket details are yet to be announced.
events.venue: Thunder Dome, Pak Kret (Nonthaburi, near Bangkok)

events.title: NCT WISH Concert Tour 'INTO THE WISH : Our WISH' in Bangkok
events.description: Promising an unforgettable night filled with powerful performances, fan-favorite songs, and the fresh youthful energy that has made them one of NCT's most exciting units.
